brand.archetype_tagline: Professional appliance repair you can count on

copy.hero_headline: Professional Appliance Repair You Can Trust
copy.hero_subheadline: Kay's Appliance Repair provides quality appliance repair services with honest pricing and expert workmanship.
copy.owner_bio: When you need a reliable appliance repair professional, look no further. Kay's Appliance Repair takes pride in delivering quality work and honest service. Whether it's a small repair or a major project, we're here to get the job done right the first time.

best_review.author: Scott Bartlett
best_review.text: Kaylee came out this week to repair our clothes dryer. This is the 4th time she has repaired an appliance for us. She is outstanding!!! Fair, flexible, timely and quick!! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

services.description: When you need help fast, we're here.

reviews.author: Scott Bartlett
reviews.text: Kaylee came out this week to repair our clothes dryer. This is the 4th time she has repaired an appliance for us. She is outstanding!!! Fair, flexible, timely and quick!! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

reviews.author: Jessie Tonyan
reviews.text: Kay’s was recommended to me by a friend. I’m glad I called her. She was able to fit me in promptly for an assessment of my washing machine and my dishwasher. She told me exactly what was wrong. She was also able to give me a quote to fix …

reviews.author: Audra Zimmermann
reviews.text: Kay fixed my washer quickly and at a very reasonable price! She was flexible with scheduling and responsive the whole way through. I will be recommending Kay’s services to family and friends for any future appliance issues!

reviews.author: David Johnson
reviews.text: Kay does excellent work, communicates when she’s on her way, and thoroughly answers all of my questions.  Kay has fixed my dishwasher and now my dryer; I will continue to use her services for appliance repairs.

reviews.author: shaina lesniewicz
reviews.text: Kay was super responsive and on time! She was in and out with our oven repair and brought the parts needed with her, so we didn’t have to wait another day for our oven to work again. Would highly recommend her!

reviews.author: Sarah Misicka
reviews.text: Kay has been to our house 3 or 4 times over the years and is always fantastic. Today she was out to fix our dryer that someone else said they didn’t service and the only option was to call GE. She said she was confident she would be able to …

seo.meta_description: Kay's Appliance Repair provides quality appliance repair services. 5★ · 102 reviews. Call (847) 902-4971 today.
